edgePaletteOptions,\n      label: 'Edge Palette',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.applyEdgePalette(this.config.selectedEdgePalette);\n    });\n\n    // Add edge color picker\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeColor', {\n      label: 'Edge Color'\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add edge width slider\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeWidth', {\n      label: 'Edge Width',\n      min: 0,\n      max: 10,\n      step: 0.1,\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add visualize edge delta checkbox\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'visualizeEdgeDelta', {\n      label: 'Visualize Edge Delta'\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add draw state selector (palette color picker)\n    this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n\n    // Add show coordinates checkbox\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'showCoordinates', {\n      label: 'Show Coordinates',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    // Add left click mode dropdown\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'leftClickMode', {\n      options: {\n        'Draw Cell': 'draw',\n        'Spawn Particle': 'spawnParticle',\n      },\n      label: 'Left Click Mode',\n    });\n\n    // Add particle speed control\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'particleSpeed', {\n      min: 1,\n      max: 400,\n      step: 1,\n      label: 'Particle Speed',\n    });\n\n    // Add edge selection rule dropdown\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeSelectionRule', {\n      options: {\n        'Random (No Backtrack)': 'randomNoBacktrack',\n        'Random (With Backtrack)': 'randomWithBacktrack',\n        'Always Turn Clockwise': 'clockwise',\n        'Always Turn Counter-Clockwise': 'counterClockwise',\n        'Follow Cursor': 'followCursor',\n        'Avoid Cursor': 'avoidCursor',\n      },\n      label: 'Edge Selection Rule',\n    });\n\n    // Add save/load PNG buttons\n    this.pane.addButton({\n      title: 'Save to PNG',\n      label: 'Save to PNG',\n    }).on('click', () => {\n      this.saveToPNG();\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addButton({\n      title: 'Load from PNG',\n      label: 'Load from PNG',\n    }).on('click', () => {\n      this.loadFromPNG();\n    });\n  }\n\n  private saveToPNG() {\n    // Create a canvas with grid dimensions\n    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n    canvas.width = this.config.gridWidth;\n    canvas.height = this.config.gridHeight;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    if (!ctx) return;\n\n    // Create ImageData\n    const imageData = ctx.createImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    const data = imageData.data;\n\n    // Convert states to grayscale\n    for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n      for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n        const state = this.cellStates[row]?.[col] ?? 0;\n        const grayscale = Math.round(255 * state / (this.config.numStates - 1));\n        const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n        data[index] = grayscale;     // R\n        data[index + 1] = grayscale; // G\n        data[index + 2] = grayscale; // B\n        data[index + 3] = 255;       // A\n      }\n    }\n\n    // Draw ImageData to canvas\n    ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);\n\n    // Convert to PNG and download\n    canvas.toBlob((blob) => {\n      if (!blob) return;\n      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      const a = document.createElement('a');\n      a.href = url;\n      a.download = 'grid.png';\n      document.body.appendChild(a);\n      a.click();\n      document.body.removeChild(a);\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n    }, 'image/png');\n  }\n\n  private loadFromPNG() {\n    // Create file input element\n    const input = document.createElement('input');\n    input.type = 'file';\n    input.accept = 'image/png';\n    input.onchange = (e: Event) => {\n      const file = (e.target as HTMLInputElement).files?.[0];\n      if (!file) return;\n\n      const reader = new FileReader();\n      reader.onload = (event) => {\n        const img = new Image();\n        img.onload = () => {\n          // Create temporary canvas to read image data\n          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n          canvas.width = img.width;\n          canvas.height = img.height;\n          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n          if (!ctx) return;\n\n          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);\n          const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n          const data = imageData.data;\n\n          // Resize grid if needed\n          if (canvas.width !== this.config.gridWidth || canvas.height !== this.config.gridHeight) {\n            this.config.gridWidth = canvas.width;\n            this.config.gridHeight = canvas.height;\n            // Update Tweakpane controls if they exist\n            // (The grid will be resized in updateGrid)\n          }\n\n          // Initialize cell states array\n          this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n            .fill(0)\n            .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n\n          // Convert grayscale back to states\n          for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n            for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n              const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n              const r = data[index];\n              const g = data[index + 1];\n              const b = data[index + 2];\n              // Use average of RGB as grayscale value\n              const grayscale = Math.round((r + g + b) / 3);\n              // Convert back to state\n              const state = Math.round(grayscale * (this.config.numStates - 1) / 255);\n              // Clamp to valid range\n              this.cellStates[row][col] = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.config.numStates - 1, state));\n            }\n          }\n\n          // Update grid display\n          this.updateGrid();\n        };\n        img.src = event.target?.result as string;\n      };\n      reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n    };\n    input.click();\n  }\n\n  private updateDrawStateBlade() {\n    // Remove existing blade if it exists\n    if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n      this.drawStateBlade.dispose();\n    }\n\n    // Create custom blade for draw state selection\n    this.drawStateBlade = createDrawStateBlade({\n      numStates: this.config.numStates,\n      palette: this.config.palette,\n      drawState: this.config.drawState,\n      onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n        this.config.drawState = state;\n        if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n          this.drawStateBlade.update({\n            numStates: this.config.numStates,\n            palette: this.config.palette,\n            drawState: this.config.drawState,\n            onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n              this.config.drawState = state;\n            },\n          });\n        }\n      },\n    });\n\n    // Add the blade to the pane\n    this.pane.add(this.drawStateBlade);\n  }\n\n  private initGrid() {\n    this.gridRenderer = new GridRenderer();\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private updateGrid() {\n    // Initialize cell states if needed\n    if (this.cellStates.length !== this.config.gridHeight || \n        this.cellStates[0]?.length !== this.config.gridWidth) {\n      this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n        .fill(0)\n        .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n    }\n\n    // Clear existing graphics (but keep particles)\n    this.gridContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.edgeContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.highlightedEdge = null;\n    this.highlightedCell = null;\n    this.highlightedVertex = null;\n\n    // Calculate grid dimensions based on type\n    let gridWidth: number, gridHeight: number;\n    if (this.config.gridType === 'squares') {\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * this.config.gridScale;\n    } else if (this.config.gridType === 'hexagons') {\n      const hexSpacingX = this.config.gridScale * Math.sqrt(3);\n      const hexSpacingY = this.config.gridScale * 1.5;\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * hexSpacingX + this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * hexSpacingY + this.config.gridScale;\n    } else { // triangles\n      const triangleHeight = this.config.gridScale * Math.sqrt(3) / 2;\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * this.config.gridScale * 0.5 + this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * triangleHeight + triangleHeight;\n    }\n\n    // Center the grid\n    const offsetX = (this.app.screen.width - gridWidth) / 2;\n    const offsetY = (this.app.screen.height - gridHeight) / 2;\n\n    // Position all containers at the same offset so cells, edges, and particles align\n    this.gridContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.gridContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.edgeContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.edgeContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.particleContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.particleContainer.y = offsetY;\n\n    // Convert palette to string format for renderer\n    const paletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.palette)) {\n      paletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    // Convert edge palette to string format for renderer\n    const edgePaletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.edgePalette)) {\n      edgePaletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    // Render grid\n    this.gridRenderer.render(\n      this.gridContainer,\n      this.edgeContainer,\n      this.config.gridWidth,\n      this.config.gridHeight,\n      this.config.gridType,\n      this.config.gridScale,\n      this.cellStates,\n      paletteStrings,\n      typeof this.config.edgeColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeColor : '#ffffff',\n      this.config.edgeWidth,\n      this.config.showCoordinates\n    );\n  }\n\n  private setupInteraction() {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseMove(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseDown(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e: MouseEvent) => e.preventDefault());\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    // Use edgeContainer position since edges are in edgeContainer\n    const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n    const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n\n    // Store mouse position for particle cursor rules\n    this.mouseX = x;\n    this.mouseY = y;\n\n    // Remove previous highlights\n    if (this.highlightedEdge) {\n      this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedEdge);\n      this.highlightedEdge = null;\n    }\n    if (this.highlightedCell) {\n      this.gridContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedCell);\n      this.highlightedCell = null;\n    }\n    if (this.highlightedVertex) {\n      this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedVertex);\n      this.highlightedVertex = null;\n    }\n\n    if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'draw') {\n      // Highlight cell\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y,\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.config.gridType,\n        this.config.gridScale\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' \n          ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor \n          : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedCell = this.gridRenderer.drawCellHighlight(\n          cellInfo,\n          this.config.gridWidth,\n          this.config.gridHeight,\n          this.config.gridType,\n          this.config.gridScale,\n          highlightColor\n        );\n        this.gridContainer.addChild(this.highlightedCell);\n      }\n    } else {\n      // Highlight edge and closest vertex\n      const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n        x, y,\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.config.gridType,\n        this.config.gridScale\n      );\n\n      if (edgeInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' \n          ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor \n          : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedEdge = this.gridRenderer.drawEdge(edgeInfo, highlightColor);\n        this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedEdge);\n\n        // Find and highlight closest vertex\n        const closestVertex = this.gridRenderer.getClosestVertex(\n          x, y,\n          this.config.gridWidth,\n          this.config.gridHeight,\n          this.config.gridType,\n          this.config.gridScale\n        );\n\n        if (closestVertex) {\n          this.highlightedVertex = this.gridRenderer.drawVertex(closestVertex, highlightColor);\n          if (this.highlightedVertex) {\n            this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedVertex);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseDown(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n\n    console.log(\"leftClickMode\", this.config.leftClickMode);\n    \n    if (e.button === 0) {\n      console.log(\"left click\");\n\n      // Left click\n      if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'spawnParticle') {\n        console.log(\"spawn branch\");\n\n        // Check for edge click for particle spawning\n        const edgeX = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n        const edgeY = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n        \n        const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n          edgeX, edgeY,\n          this.config.gridWidth,\n          this.config.gridHeight,\n          this.config.gridType,\n          this.config.gridScale\n        );\n\n        if (edgeInfo) {\n          // Spawn particle on edge click\n          this.particleSystem.spawnParticle(edgeInfo, edgeX, edgeY);\n          return;\n        }\n      } else {\n        console.log(\"draw branch\");\n        \n        // Draw mode - check for cell click\n        const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n        const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n        const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n          x, y,\n          this.config.gridWidth,\n          this.config.gridHeight,\n          this.config.gridType,\n          this.config.gridScale\n        );\n\n        if (cellInfo) {\n          this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = this.config.drawState;\n          this.updateGrid();\n        }\n      }\n    } else if (e.button === 2) {\n      // Right click: always clear cell (set to state 0)\n      const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n      const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y,\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.config.gridType,\n        this.config.gridScale\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = 0;\n        this.updateGrid();\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// Initialize app when DOM is ready\nif (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => new GridApp());\n} else {\n  new GridApp();\n}\n\n"
  }
}
```

---

## MODEL ✨

Okay, I'm refactoring `src/main.ts` to use the new `Grid` object. First, I'll import the `Grid` classes, then replace `gridRenderer`'s grid handling with a `this.grid` instance initialized in the `GridApp` constructor via a `createGrid` helper. `initGrid` will set up `this.grid`. `updateGrid` will pass `this.grid` to `gridRenderer.render`, removing direct grid dimension calculations, and update `this.grid` on relevant `config` changes. Finally, interaction methods (`handleMouseMove`, `handleMouseDown`) will call `this.grid` directly for geometric operations. I'll execute this via a full `write_file` operation.**Tool Command**:
```json
{
  "name": "write_file",
  "args": {
    "content": "import { Application, Graphics, Container } from 'pixi.js';\nimport { Pane } from 'tweakpane';\nimport { GridRenderer } from './grid-renderer';\nimport { GridType } from './types';\nimport { createDrawStateBlade, DrawStateBladeApi } from './draw-state-blade';\nimport palettesData from './assets/palettes.json';\nimport { ParticleSystem } from './particle-system';\nimport { Grid, SquareGrid, HexagonGrid, TriangleGrid } from './grid'; // Import new Grid classes\n\ntype ColorValue = string | { r: number; g: number; b: number; a?: number };\n\ninterface PaletteData {\n  name: string;\n  colors: Record<string, string>;\n}\n\ntype LeftClickMode = 'draw' | 'spawnParticle';\ntype EdgeSelectionRule = 'randomNoBacktrack' | 'randomWithBacktrack' | 'clockwise' | 'counterClockwise' | 'followCursor' | 'avoidCursor';\n\ninterface AppConfig {\n  gridWidth: number;\n  gridHeight: number;\n  gridType: GridType;\n  gridScale: number;\n  numStates: number;\n  drawState: number;\n  palette: Record<number, ColorValue>;\n  selectedPalette: string;\n  edgePalette: Record<number, ColorValue>;\n  selectedEdgePalette: string;\n  edgeColor: ColorValue;\n  edgeWidth: number;\n  edgeHighlightColor: ColorValue;\n  visualizeEdgeDelta: boolean;\n  showCoordinates: boolean;\n  particleSpeed: number;\n  leftClickMode: LeftClickMode;\n  edgeSelectionRule: EdgeSelectionRule;\n}\n\nclass GridApp {\n  private app!: Application;\n  private gridRenderer!: GridRenderer;\n  private pane!: Pane;\n  private config: AppConfig;\n  private gridContainer!: Container;\n  private edgeContainer!: Container;\n  private particleContainer!: Container;\n  private highlightedEdge: Graphics | null = null;\n  private highlightedCell: Graphics | null = null;\n  private highlightedVertex: Graphics | null = null;\n  private cellStates: number[][] = [];\n  private drawStateBlade: DrawStateBladeApi | null = null;\n  private palettes: PaletteData[] = [];\n  private particleSystem!: ParticleSystem;\n  private mouseX: number = 0;\n  private mouseY: number = 0;\n  private grid: Grid; // Instance of the abstract Grid\n\n  constructor() {\n    this.palettes = palettesData.palettes;\n    \n    const defaultPalette = this.palettes[0];\n    const initialPalette: Record<number, ColorValue> = {};\n    Object.keys(defaultPalette.colors).forEach(key => {\n      initialPalette[parseInt(key)] = defaultPalette.colors[key];\n    });\n\n    const initialEdgePalette: Record<number, ColorValue> = {};\n    Object.keys(defaultPalette.colors).forEach(key => {\n      initialEdgePalette[parseInt(key)] = defaultPalette.colors[key];\n    });\n\n    this.config = {\n      gridWidth: 25,\n      gridHeight: 18,\n      gridType: 'hexagons',\n      gridScale: 30,\n      numStates: 8,\n      drawState: 7,\n      palette: initialPalette,\n      selectedPalette: defaultPalette.name,\n      edgePalette: initialEdgePalette,\n      selectedEdgePalette: defaultPalette.name,\n      edgeColor: '#ffffff',\n      edgeWidth: 1,\n      edgeHighlightColor: '#ffff00',\n      visualizeEdgeDelta: false,\n      showCoordinates: false,\n      particleSpeed: 100,\n      leftClickMode: 'randomNoBacktrack', // Default value\n      edgeSelectionRule: 'spawnParticle', // Default value\n    };\n\n    this.grid = this.createGrid(this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale); // Initialize grid here\n\n    this.initPixi().then(() => {\n      this.initInfoPanel();\n      this.initTweakpane();\n      this.initGrid();\n      this.setupInteraction();\n    });\n  }\n\n  private createGrid(gridType: GridType, scale: number): Grid {\n    switch (gridType) {\n      case 'squares': return new SquareGrid(scale);\n      case 'hexagons': return new HexagonGrid(scale);\n      case 'triangles': return new TriangleGrid(scale);\n    }\n  }\n\n  private initInfoPanel() {\n    const panel = document.createElement('div');\n    panel.id = 'info-panel';\n    \n    const header = document.createElement('div');\n    header.id = 'info-panel-header';\n    \n    const title = document.createElement('h2');\n    title.textContent = 'About';\n    \n    const closeButton = document.createElement('button');\n    closeButton.id = 'info-panel-close';\n    closeButton.innerHTML = '×';\n    closeButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Minimize info panel');\n    closeButton.onclick = () => {\n      panel.classList.add('minimized');\n    };\n    \n    const reopenButton = document.createElement('button');\n    reopenButton.id = 'info-panel-reopen';\n    reopenButton.innerHTML = '&nbsp;ℹ';\n    reopenButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Open info panel');\n    reopenButton.onclick = () => {\n      panel.classList.remove('minimized');\n    };\n    \n    header.appendChild(title);\n    header.appendChild(closeButton);\n    header.appendChild(reopenButton);\n    \n    const content = document.createElement('div');\n    content.id = 'info-panel-content';\n    \n    const description = document.createElement('p');\n    description.textContent = `Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.    \n    content.appendChild(description);\n    \n    const links = document.createElement('div');\n    links.id = 'info-panel-links';\n    \n    const manualLink = document.createElement('a');\n    manualLink.href = '#';\n    manualLink.textContent = '📖 User Manual';\n    manualLink.onclick = (e) => {\n      e.preventDefault();\n      alert('Manual coming soon!');\n    };\n    \n    const githubLink.rel = 'noopener noreferrer';\n    \n    const statisticsLink = document.createElement('a');\n    statisticsLink.href = 'statistics.html';\n    statisticsLink.textContent = '📊 Project Statistics';\n    \n    links.appendChild(manualLink);\n    links.appendChild(githubLink);\n    links.appendChild(statisticsLink);\n    \n    panel.appendChild(header);\n    panel.appendChild(content);\n    panel.appendChild(links);\n    \n    document.body.appendChild(panel);\n  }\n\n  private applyPalette(paletteName: string) {\n    const palette = this.palettes.find(p => p.name === paletteName);\n    if (!palette) return;\n\n    Object.keys(palette.colors).forEach(key => {\n      this.config.palette[parseInt(key)] = palette.colors[key];\n    });\n\n    this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private applyEdgePalette(paletteName: string) {\n    const palette = this.palettes.find(p => p.name === paletteName);\n    if (!palette) return;\n\n    Object.keys(palette.colors).forEach(key => {\n      this.config.edgePalette[parseInt(key)] = palette.colors[key];\n    });\n    \n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private async initPixi() {\n    this.app = new Application();\n    await this.app.init({ \n      antialias: true, \n      resizeTo: window,\n      backgroundColor: 0x1a1a1a,\n    });\n    \n    const appElement = document.getElementById('app');\n    if (appElement) {\n      appElement.appendChild(this.app.canvas);\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer = new Container();\n    this.edgeContainer = new Container();\n    this.particleContainer = new Container();\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.gridContainer);\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.edgeContainer);\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.particleContainer);\n\n    this.particleSystem = new ParticleSystem(this.particleContainer);\n\n    this.app.ticker.add((ticker) => {\n      this.particleSystem.update(\n        ticker.deltaMS,\n        this.config.particleSpeed,\n        this.config.gridScale,\n        this.gridRenderer,\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.config.gridType,\n        this.config.edgeSelectionRule,\n        this.mouseX,\n        this.mouseY\n      );\n    });\n  }\n\n  private initTweakpane() {\n    this.pane = new Pane({ title: 'Grid Controls' });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridWidth', {\n      min: 1, max: 80, step: 1, label: 'Grid Width',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridHeight', {\n      min: 1, max: 50, step: 1, label: 'Grid Height',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridType', {\n      options: { squares: 'squares', hexagons: 'hexagons', triangles: 'triangles' },\n      label: 'Grid Type',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridScale', {\n      min: 5, max: 100, step: 1, label: 'Grid Scale',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'numStates', {\n      min: 2, max: 8, step: 1, label: 'Number of States',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      if (this.config.drawState >= this.config.numStates) {\n        this.config.drawState = this.config.numStates - 1;\n      }\n      this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    const paletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n    this.palettes.forEach(palette => {\n      paletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedPalette', {\n      options: paletteOptions, label: 'Palette',\n    }).on('change', () => this.applyPalette(this.config.selectedPalette));\n\n    const edgePaletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n    this.palettes.forEach(palette => {\n      edgePaletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedEdgePalette', {\n      options: edgePaletteOptions, label: 'Edge Palette',\n    }).on('change', () => this.applyEdgePalette(this.config.selectedEdgePalette));\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeColor', {\n      label: 'Edge Color'\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeWidth', {\n      label: 'Edge Width', min: 0, max: 10, step: 0.1,\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'visualizeEdgeDelta', {\n      label: 'Visualize Edge Delta'\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'showCoordinates', {\n      label: 'Show Coordinates',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'leftClickMode', {\n      options: { 'Draw Cell': 'draw', 'Spawn Particle': 'spawnParticle' },\n      label: 'Left Click Mode',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'particleSpeed', {\n      min: 1, max: 400, step: 1, label: 'Particle Speed',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeSelectionRule', {\n      options: {\n        'Random (No Backtrack)': 'randomNoBacktrack',\n        'Random (With Backtrack)': 'randomWithBacktrack',\n        'Always Turn Clockwise': 'clockwise',\n        'Always Turn Counter-Clockwise': 'counterClockwise',\n        'Follow Cursor': 'followCursor',\n        'Avoid Cursor': 'avoidCursor',\n      },\n      label: 'Edge Selection Rule',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addButton({ title: 'Save to PNG', label: 'Save to PNG' }).on('click', () => this.saveToPNG());\n    this.pane.addButton({ title: 'Load from PNG', label: 'Load from PNG' }).on('click', () => this.loadFromPNG());\n  }\n\n  private saveToPNG() {\n    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n    canvas.width = this.config.gridWidth;\n    canvas.height = this.config.gridHeight;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    if (!ctx) return;\n\n    const imageData = ctx.createImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    const data = imageData.data;\n\n    for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n      for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n        const state = this.cellStates[row]?.[col] ?? 0;\n        const grayscale = Math.round(255 * state / (this.config.numStates - 1));\n        const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n        data[index] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 1] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 2] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 3] = 255;\n      }\n    }\n\n    ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);\n\n    canvas.toBlob((blob) => {\n      if (!blob) return;\n      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      const a = document.createElement('a');\n      a.href = url;\n      a.download = 'grid.png';\n      document.body.appendChild(a);\n      a.click();\n      document.body.removeChild(a);\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n    }, 'image/png');\n  }\n\n  private loadFromPNG() {\n    const input = document.createElement('input');\n    input.type = 'file';\n    input.accept = 'image/png';\n    input.onchange = (e: Event) => {\n      const file = (e.target as HTMLInputElement).files?.[0];\n      if (!file) return;\n\n      const reader = new FileReader();\n      reader.onload = (event) => {\n        const img = new Image();\n        img.onload = () => {\n          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n          canvas.width = img.width;\n          canvas.height = img.height;\n          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n          if (!ctx) return;\n\n          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);\n          const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n          const data = imageData.data;\n\n          if (canvas.width !== this.config.gridWidth || canvas.height !== this.config.gridHeight) {\n            this.config.gridWidth = canvas.width;\n            this.config.gridHeight = canvas.height;\n          }\n\n          this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n            .fill(0)\n            .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n\n          for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n            for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n              const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n              const r = data[index];\n              const g = data[index + 1];\n              const b = data[index + 2];\n              const grayscale = Math.round((r + g + b) / 3);\n              const state = Math.round(grayscale * (this.config.numStates - 1) / 255);\n              this.cellStates[row][col] = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.config.numStates - 1, state));\n            }\n          }\n\n          this.updateGrid();\n        };\n        img.src = event.target?.result as string;\n      };\n      reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n    };\n    input.click();\n  }\n\n  private updateDrawStateBlade() {\n    if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n      this.drawStateBlade.dispose();\n    }\n\n    this.drawStateBlade = createDrawStateBlade({\n      numStates: this.config.numStates,\n      palette: this.config.palette,\n      drawState: this.config.drawState,\n      onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n        this.config.drawState = state;\n        if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n          this.drawStateBlade.update({\n            numStates: this.config.numStates,\n            palette: this.config.palette,\n            drawState: this.config.drawState,\n            onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n              this.config.drawState = state;\n            },\n          });\n        }\n      },\n    });\n    this.pane.add(this.drawStateBlade);\n  }\n\n  private initGrid() {\n    this.gridRenderer = new GridRenderer(); // This will be updated\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private updateGrid() {\n    if (this.cellStates.length !== this.config.gridHeight || \n        this.cellStates[0]?.length !== this.config.gridWidth) {\n      this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n        .fill(0)\n        .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.edgeContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.highlightedEdge = null;\n    this.highlightedCell = null;\n    this.highlightedVertex = null;\n\n    // Calculate grid dimensions based on type (this will be refactored)\n    let gridWidth: number, gridHeight: number;\n    if (this.config.gridType === 'squares') {\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * this.config.gridScale;\n    } else if (this.config.gridType === 'hexagons') {\n      const hexSpacingX = this.config.gridScale * Math.sqrt(3);\n      const hexSpacingY = this.config.gridScale * 1.5;\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * hexSpacingX + this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * hexSpacingY + this.config.gridScale;\n    } else { // triangles\n      const triangleHeight = this.config.gridScale * Math.sqrt(3) / 2;\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * this.config.gridScale * 0.5 + this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * triangleHeight + triangleHeight;\n    }\n\n    const offsetX = (this.app.screen.width - gridWidth) / 2;\n    const offsetY = (this.app.screen.height - gridHeight) / 2;\n\n    this.gridContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.gridContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.edgeContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.edgeContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.particleContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.particleContainer.y = offsetY;\n\n    const paletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.palette)) {\n      paletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    const edgePaletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.edgePalette)) {\n      edgePaletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    this.gridRenderer.render(\n      this.gridContainer,\n      this.edgeContainer,\n      this.config.gridWidth,\n      this.config.gridHeight,\n      this.config.gridType,\n      this.config.gridScale,\n      this.cellStates,\n      paletteStrings,\n      typeof this.config.edgeColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeColor : '#ffffff',\n      this.config.edgeWidth,\n      this.config.visualizeEdgeDelta,\n      edgePaletteStrings,\n      this.config.showCoordinates\n    );\n  }\n\n  private setupInteraction() {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseMove(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseDown(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e: MouseEvent) => e.preventDefault());\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n    const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n\n    this.mouseX = x;\n    this.mouseY = y;\n\n    if (this.highlightedEdge) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedEdge); this.highlightedEdge = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedCell) { this.gridContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedCell); this.highlightedCell = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedVertex) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedVertex); this.highlightedVertex = null; }\n\n    if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'draw') {\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedCell = this.gridRenderer.drawCellHighlight(\n          cellInfo, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, highlightColor\n        );\n        this.gridContainer.addChild(this.highlightedCell);\n      }\n    } else {\n      const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale\n      );\n\n      if (edgeInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedEdge = this.gridRenderer.drawEdge(edgeInfo, highlightColor);\n        this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedEdge);\n\n        const closestVertex = this.gridRenderer.getClosestVertex(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale\n        );\n\n        if (closestVertex) {\n          this.highlightedVertex = this.gridRenderer.drawVertex(closestVertex, highlightColor);\n          if (this.highlightedVertex) {\n            this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedVertex);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseDown(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    \n    if (e.button === 0) { // Left click\n      if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'spawnParticle') {\n        const edgeX = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n        const edgeY = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n        \n        const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n          edgeX, edgeY, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale\n        );\n\n        if (edgeInfo) {\n          this.particleSystem.spawnParticle(edgeInfo, edgeX, edgeY);\n          return;\n        }\n      } else { // Draw mode\n        const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n        const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n        const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale\n        );\n\n        if (cellInfo) {\n          this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = this.config.drawState;\n          this.updateGrid();\n        }\n      }\n    } else if (e.button === 2) { // Right click: always clear cell\n      const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n      const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = 0;\n        this.updateGrid();\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// Initialize app when DOM is ready\nif (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => new GridApp());\n} else {\n  new GridApp();\n}"
  }
}

// Import new Grid classes\n\ntype ColorValue = string | { r: number; g: number; b: number; a?: number };\n\ninterface PaletteData {\n  name: string;\n  colors: Record<string, string>;\n}\n\ntype LeftClickMode = 'draw' | 'spawnParticle';\ntype EdgeSelectionRule = 'randomNoBacktrack' | 'randomWithBacktrack' | 'clockwise' | 'counterClockwise' | 'followCursor' | 'avoidCursor';\n\ninterface AppConfig {\n  gridWidth: number;\n  gridHeight: number;\n  gridType: GridType;\n  gridScale: number;\n  numStates: number;\n  drawState: number;\n  palette: Record<number, ColorValue>;\n  selectedPalette: string;\n  edgePalette: Record<number, ColorValue>;\n  selectedEdgePalette: string;\n  edgeColor: ColorValue;\n  edgeWidth: number;\n  edgeHighlightColor: ColorValue;\n  visualizeEdgeDelta: boolean;\n  showCoordinates: boolean;\n  particleSpeed: number;\n  leftClickMode: LeftClickMode;\n  edgeSelectionRule: EdgeSelectionRule;\n}\n\nclass GridApp {\n  private app!: Application;\n  private gridRenderer!: GridRenderer;\n  private pane!: Pane;\n  private config: AppConfig;\n  private gridContainer!: Container;\n  private edgeContainer!: Container;\n  private particleContainer!: Container;\n  private highlightedEdge: Graphics | null = null;\n  private highlightedCell: Graphics | null = null;\n  private highlightedVertex: Graphics | null = null;\n  private cellStates: number[][] = [];\n  private drawStateBlade: DrawStateBladeApi | null = null;\n  private palettes: PaletteData[] = [];\n  private particleSystem!: ParticleSystem;\n  private mouseX: number = 0;\n  private mouseY: number = 0;\n  private grid: Grid; this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private applyEdgePalette(paletteName: string) {\n    const palette = this.palettes.find(p => p.name === paletteName);\n    if (!palette) initPixi() {\n    this.app = new Application();\n    await this.app.init({ \n      antialias: true, \n      resizeTo: window,\n      backgroundColor: 0x1a1a1a,\n    });\n    \n    const appElement =   this.particleContainer = new Container();\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.gridContainer);\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.edgeContainer);\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.particleContainer);\n\n    this.particleSystem = new ParticleSystem(this.particleContainer);\n\n    this.app.ticker.add((ticker) => {\n      this.particleSystem.update(\n this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridHeight', {\n      min: 1, max: 50, step: 1, label: 'Grid Height',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridScale', {\n      min: 5, max: 100, step: 1, label: 'Grid Scale',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'numStates', {\n      min: 2, max: 8, step: 1, label: 'Number of States',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      if (this.config.drawState >= this.config.numStates) {\n        this.config.drawState = }).on('change', () => this.applyPalette(this.config.selectedPalette));\n\n    const edgePaletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n    this.palettes.forEach(palette => {\n      edgePaletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedEdgePalette', {\n      options: edgePaletteOptions, label: 'Edge Palette',\n this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'visualizeEdgeDelta', {\n      label: 'Visualize Edge Delta'\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'showCoordinates', {\n      label: 'Show Coordinates',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'leftClickMode', {\n      options: { 'Draw Cell': 'draw', 'Spawn Particle': 'spawnParticle' },\n      label: 'Left Click Mode',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'particleSpeed', {\n      min: 1, max: 400, this.saveToPNG());\n    this.pane.addButton({ title: 'Load from PNG', label: 'Load from PNG' }).on('click', () => this.loadFromPNG());\n  }\n\n  private saveToPNG() {\n    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n    canvas.width = this.config.gridWidth;\n    canvas.height = this.config.gridHeight;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    if (!ctx) return;\n\n    const imageData = ctx.createImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    const data = imageData.data;\n\n    for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n      for (let col = 0; col < private loadFromPNG() {\n    const input = document.createElement('input');\n    input.type = 'file';\n    input.accept = 'image/png';\n    input.onchange = (e: Event) => {\n      const file = (e.target as HTMLInputElement).files?.[0];\n      if (!file) return;\n\n      const reader = new FileReader();\n      reader.onload = (event) => {\n        const img = new Image();\n        img.onload = () => {\n          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n          canvas.width = img.width;\n          canvas.height = img.height;\n          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n          if (!ctx) return;\n\n          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);\n          const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n          const data = imageData.data;\n\n          if (canvas.width !== this.config.gridWidth || canvas.height !== this.config.gridHeight) {\n            this.config.gridWidth = canvas.width;\n            this.config.gridHeight = canvas.height;\n          }\n\n          this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n            .fill(0)\n            .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n\n          for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n            for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n              const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n              const r = data[index];\n              const g = data[index + 1];\n              const b = data[index + 2];\n              const grayscale = Math.round((r + g + b) / 3);\n              const state = Math.round(grayscale * (this.config.numStates - 1) / 255);\n              this.cellStates[row][col] = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.config.numStates - 1, state));\n            }\n          }\n\n          this.updateGrid();\n        };\n        img.src = event.target?.result as string;\n      };\n      reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n    };\n    input.click();\n  }\n\n  private updateDrawStateBlade() {\n    if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n      this.drawStateBlade.dispose();\n    }\n\n    this.drawStateBlade = createDrawStateBlade({\n      numStates: this.config.numStates,\n      palette: this.config.palette,\n      drawState: this.config.drawState,\n      onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n        this.config.drawState = state;\n        if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n          this.drawStateBlade.update({\n            numStates: this.config.numStates,\n            palette: this.config.palette,\n            drawState: this.config.drawState,\n            onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n              this.config.drawState = state;\n            },\n          });\n        }\n      },\n    });\n    this.pane.add(this.drawStateBlade);\n  }\n\n  private initGrid() {\n    this.gridRenderer = new GridRenderer(); // This will be updated\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private updateGrid() {\n    if (this.cellStates.length !== this.config.gridHeight || \n        this.cellStates[0]?.length !== this.config.gridWidth) {\n      this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n        .fill(0)\n        .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.edgeContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.highlightedEdge = null;\n    this.highlightedCell = null;\n    this.highlightedVertex = null;\n\n    // Calculate grid dimensions based on type (this will be refactored)\n    let gridWidth: number, gridHeight: number;\n    if (this.config.gridType === 'squares') {\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * this.config.gridScale;\n    } else if (this.config.gridType === 'hexagons') {\n      const hexSpacingX = this.config.gridScale * Math.sqrt(3);\n      const hexSpacingY = this.config.gridScale * 1.5;\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * hexSpacingX + this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * hexSpacingY + this.config.gridScale;\n    } else { // triangles\n      const triangleHeight = this.config.gridScale * Math.sqrt(3) / 2;\n      gridWidth = this.config.gridWidth * this.config.gridScale * 0.5 + this.config.gridScale;\n      gridHeight = this.config.gridHeight * triangleHeight + triangleHeight;\n    }\n\n    const offsetX = (this.app.screen.width - gridWidth) / 2;\n    const offsetY = (this.app.screen.height - gridHeight) / 2;\n\n    this.gridContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.gridContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.edgeContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.edgeContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.particleContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.particleContainer.y = offsetY;\n\n    const paletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.palette)) {\n      paletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    const edgePaletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.edgePalette)) {\n      edgePaletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    this.gridRenderer.render(\n      this.gridContainer,\n      this.edgeContainer,\n      this.config.gridWidth,\n      this.config.gridHeight,\n      this.config.gridType,\n      this.config.gridScale,\n      this.cellStates,\n      paletteStrings,\n      typeof this.config.edgeColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeColor : '#ffffff',\n      this.config.edgeWidth,\n      this.config.showCoordinates\n    );\n  }\n\n  private setupInteraction() {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseMove(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseDown(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e: MouseEvent) => e.preventDefault());\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n    const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n\n    this.mouseX = x;\n    this.mouseY = y;\n\n    if (this.highlightedEdge) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedEdge); this.highlightedEdge = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedCell) { this.gridContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedCell); this.highlightedCell = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedVertex) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedVertex); this.highlightedVertex = null; }\n\n    if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'draw') {\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedCell = this.gridRenderer.drawCellHighlight(\n          cellInfo, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, highlightColor\n        );\n        this.gridContainer.addChild(this.highlightedCell);\n      }\n    } else {\n      const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale\n      );\n\n      if (edgeInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedEdge = this.gridRenderer.drawEdge(edgeInfo, highlightColor);\n        this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedEdge);\n\n        const closestVertex = this.gridRenderer.getClosestVertex(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale\n        );\n\n        if (closestVertex) {\n          this.highlightedVertex = this.gridRenderer.drawVertex(closestVertex, highlightColor);\n          if (this.highlightedVertex) {\n            this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedVertex);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseDown(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    \n    if (e.button === 0) { // Left click\n      if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'spawnParticle') {\n        const edgeX = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n        const edgeY = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n        \n        const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n          edgeX, edgeY, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale\n        );\n\n        if (edgeInfo) {\n          this.particleSystem.spawnParticle(edgeInfo, edgeX, edgeY);\n          return;\n        }\n      } else { // Draw mode\n        const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n        const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n        const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale\n        );\n\n        if (cellInfo) {\n          this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = this.config.drawState;\n          this.updateGrid();\n        }\n      }\n    } else if (e.button === 2) { // Right click: always clear cell\n      const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n      const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = 0;\n        this.updateGrid();\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// Initialize app when DOM is ready\nif (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => new GridApp());\n} else {\n  new GridApp();\n}"
  }
}

// Import new Grid classes\n\ntype ColorValue = string | { r: number; g: number; b: number; a?: number };\n\ninterface PaletteData {\n  name: string;\n  colors: Record<string, string>;\n}\n\ntype LeftClickMode = 'draw' | 'spawnParticle';\ntype EdgeSelectionRule = 'randomNoBacktrack' | 'randomWithBacktrack' | 'clockwise' | 'counterClockwise' | 'followCursor' | 'avoidCursor';\n\ninterface AppConfig {\n  gridWidth: number;\n  gridHeight: number;\n  gridType: GridType;\n  gridScale: number;\n  numStates: number;\n  drawState: number;\n  palette: Record<number, ColorValue>;\n  selectedPalette: string;\n  edgePalette: Record<number, ColorValue>;\n  selectedEdgePalette: string;\n  edgeColor: ColorValue;\n  edgeWidth: number;\n  edgeHighlightColor: ColorValue;\n  visualizeEdgeDelta: boolean;\n  showCoordinates: boolean;\n  particleSpeed: number;\n  leftClickMode: LeftClickMode;\n  edgeSelectionRule: EdgeSelectionRule;\n}\n\nclass GridApp {\n  private app!: Application;\n  private gridRenderer!: GridRenderer;\n  private pane!: Pane;\n  private config: AppConfig;\n  private gridContainer!: Container;\n  private edgeContainer!: Container;\n  private particleContainer!: Container;\n  private highlightedEdge: Graphics | null = null;\n  private highlightedCell: Graphics | null = null;\n  private highlightedVertex: Graphics | null = null;\n  private cellStates: number[][] = [];\n  private drawStateBlade: DrawStateBladeApi | null = null;\n  private palettes: PaletteData[] = [];\n  private particleSystem!: ParticleSystem;\n  private mouseX: number = 0;\n  private mouseY: number = 0;\n  private grid: Grid; initPixi() {\n    this.app = new Application();\n    await this.app.init({ \n      antialias: true, \n      resizeTo: window,\n      backgroundColor: 0x1a1a1a,\n    });\n    \n    const appElement = document.getElementById('app');\n    if (appElement) {\n      appElement.appendChild(this.app.canvas);\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer = new Container();\n    this.edgeContainer = new Container();\n this.app.stage.addChild(this.particleContainer);\n\n    this.particleSystem = new ParticleSystem(this.particleContainer);\n\n    this.app.ticker.add((ticker) => {\n      this.particleSystem.update(\n        ticker.deltaMS,\n        this.config.particleSpeed,\n        this.config.gridScale,\n        this.gridRenderer, // This will be refactored\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridHeight', {\n      min: 1, max: 50, step: 1, label: 'Grid Height',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridScale', {\n      min: 5, max: 100, step: 1, label: 'Grid Scale',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'numStates', {\n      min: 2, max: 8, step: 1, label: 'Number of States',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      if (this.config.drawState >= this.config.numStates) {\n edgePaletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedEdgePalette', {\n      options: edgePaletteOptions, label: 'Edge Palette',\n this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'visualizeEdgeDelta', {\n      label: 'Visualize Edge Delta'\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'showCoordinates', {\n      label: 'Show Coordinates',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'leftClickMode', {\n      options: { 'Draw Cell': 'draw', 'Spawn Particle': 'spawnParticle' },\n      label: 'Left Click Mode',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'particleSpeed', {\n      min: 1, max: 400, this.saveToPNG());\n    this.pane.addButton({ title: 'Load from PNG', label: 'Load from PNG' }).on('click', () => this.loadFromPNG());\n  }\n\n  private saveToPNG() {\n    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n    canvas.width = this.config.gridWidth;\n    canvas.height = this.config.gridHeight;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    if (!ctx) return;\n\n    const imageData = ctx.createImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    const data = imageData.data;\n\n    for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n      for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n        const state = this.cellStates[row]?.[col] ?? 0;\n        const grayscale = Math.round(255 * state / (this.config.numStates - 1));\n        const index = (row * ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);\n\n    canvas.toBlob((blob) => {\n      if (!blob) return;\n      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      const a = document.createElement('a');\n      a.href = url;\n      a.download = 'grid.png';\n      document.body.appendChild(a);\n      a.click();\n      document.body.removeChild(a);\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n    }, 'image/png');\n  }\n\n  private loadFromPNG() {\n    const input = document.createElement('input');\n    input.type = 'file';\n    input.accept = 'image/png';\n    input.onchange = (e: Event) => {\n      const file = (e.target as HTMLInputElement).files?.[0];\n      if (!file) return;\n\n      const reader = new FileReader();\n      reader.onload = (event) => {\n        const img = new Image();\n        img.onload = () => {\n          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n          canvas.width = img.width;\n          canvas.height = img.height;\n          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n          if (!ctx) return;\n\n          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);\n          const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n          const data = imageData.data;\n\n          if (canvas.width !== this.config.gridWidth || canvas.height !== this.config.gridHeight) {\n            this.config.gridWidth = canvas.width;\n            this.config.gridHeight = canvas.height;\n this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n            for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n              const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n              const r = data[index];\n              const g = data[index + 1];\n              const b = data[index + 2];\n              const grayscale = Math.round((r + g + b) / 3);\n              const state = Math.round(grayscale * (this.config.numStates - 1) / 255);\n              this.cellStates[row][col] = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.config.numStates - 1, state));\n            }\n          }\n\n          this.updateGrid();\n        };\n        img.src = event.target?.result as string;\n      };\n      reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n    };\n    input.click();\n  }\n\n  private updateDrawStateBlade() {\n    if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n      this.drawStateBlade.dispose();\n    }\n\n    this.drawStateBlade = createDrawStateBlade({\n      numStates: this.config.numStates,\n      palette: this.config.palette,\n      drawState: this.config.drawState,\n      onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n        this.config.drawState = state;\n        if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n          this.drawStateBlade.update({\n            numStates: this.config.numStates,\n            palette: this.config.palette,\n            drawState: this.config.drawState,\n            onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n              this.config.drawState = state;\n            },\n          });\n        }\n      },\n    });\n    this.pane.add(this.drawStateBlade);\n  }\n\n  private initGrid() {\n    this.gridRenderer = new GridRenderer(); // This will be updated\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private updateGrid() {\n    // Update the Grid instance if grid type or scale changed\n    if (this.grid.type !== this.config.gridType || this.grid.scale !== this.config.gridScale) {\n        this.grid = this.createGrid(this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale);\n    }\n    \n    if (this.cellStates.length !== this.config.gridHeight || \n        this.cellStates[0]?.length !== this.config.gridWidth) {\n      this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n        .fill(0)\n        .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.edgeContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.highlightedEdge = null;\n    this.highlightedCell = null;\n    this.highlightedVertex = null;\n\n    // Calculate grid dimensions using the new Grid object\n    const pixelDimensions = this.grid.getGridPixelDimensions(this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight);\n    const gridWidth = pixelDimensions.width;\n    const gridHeight = pixelDimensions.height;\n\n    const offsetX = (this.app.screen.width - gridWidth) / 2;\n    const offsetY = (this.app.screen.height - gridHeight) / 2;\n\n    this.gridContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.gridContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.edgeContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.edgeContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.particleContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.particleContainer.y = offsetY;\n\n    const paletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.palette)) {\n      paletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    const edgePaletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.edgePalette)) {\n      edgePaletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    this.gridRenderer.render(\n      this.gridContainer,\n      this.edgeContainer,\n      this.config.gridWidth,\n      this.config.gridHeight,\n      this.config.gridType,\n      this.config.gridScale,\n      this.cellStates,\n      paletteStrings,\n      typeof this.config.edgeColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeColor : '#ffffff',\n      this.config.edgeWidth,\n      this.config.showCoordinates,\n      this.grid // Pass the Grid instance\n    );\n  }\n\n  private setupInteraction() {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseMove(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseDown(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e: MouseEvent) => e.preventDefault());\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n    const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n\n    this.mouseX = x;\n    this.mouseY = y;\n\n    if (this.highlightedEdge) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedEdge); this.highlightedEdge = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedCell) { this.gridContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedCell); this.highlightedCell = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedVertex) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedVertex); this.highlightedVertex = null; }\n\n    if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'draw') {\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedCell = this.gridRenderer.drawCellHighlight(\n          cellInfo, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, highlightColor, this.grid\n        );\n        this.gridContainer.addChild(this.highlightedCell);\n      }\n    } else {\n      const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (edgeInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedEdge = this.gridRenderer.drawEdge(edgeInfo, highlightColor);\n        this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedEdge);\n\n        const closestVertex = this.gridRenderer.getClosestVertex(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (closestVertex) {\n          this.highlightedVertex = this.gridRenderer.drawVertex(closestVertex, highlightColor);\n          if (this.highlightedVertex) {\n            this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedVertex);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseDown(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    \n    if (e.button === 0) { // Left click\n      if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'spawnParticle') {\n        const edgeX = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n        const edgeY = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n        \n        const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n          edgeX, edgeY, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (edgeInfo) {\n          this.particleSystem.spawnParticle(edgeInfo, edgeX, edgeY);\n          return;\n        }\n      } else { // Draw mode\n        const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n        const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n        const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (cellInfo) {\n          this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = this.config.drawState;\n          this.updateGrid();\n        }\n      }\n    } else if (e.button === 2) { // Right click: always clear cell\n      const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n      const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = 0;\n        this.updateGrid();\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// Initialize app when DOM is ready\nif (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => new GridApp());\n} else {\n  new GridApp();\n}",
    "file_path": "src/main.ts"
  }
}

initPixi() {\n    this.app = new Application();\n    await this.app.init({ \n      antialias: true, \n      resizeTo: window,\n      backgroundColor: 0x1a1a1a,\n    });\n    \n    const appElement = this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridType', {\n      options: { squares: 'squares', hexagons: 'hexagons', triangles: 'triangles' },\n      label: 'Grid Type',\n    }).on('change', () => this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'numStates', {\n      min: 2, max: 8, step: 1, label: 'Number of States',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      if (this.config.drawState >= this.config.numStates) {\n edgePaletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedEdgePalette', {\n      options: edgePaletteOptions, label: 'Edge Palette',\n this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'showCoordinates', {\n      label: 'Show Coordinates',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'leftClickMode', {\n      options: { 'Draw Cell': 'draw', 'Spawn Particle': 'spawnParticle' },\n      label: 'Left Click Mode',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'particleSpeed', {\n      min: 1, max: 400, this.saveToPNG());\n    this.pane.addButton({ title: 'Load from PNG', label: 'Load from PNG' }).on('click', () => this.loadFromPNG());\n  }\n\n  private saveToPNG() {\n    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n    canvas.width = this.config.gridWidth;\n    canvas.height = this.config.gridHeight;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    if (!ctx) return;\n\n    const imageData = ctx.createImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    const data = imageData.data;\n\n    for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n      for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n        const state = this.cellStates[row]?.[col] ?? 0;\n        const grayscale = Math.round(255 * state / (this.config.numStates - 1));\n        const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n        data[index] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 1] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 2] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 3] = 255;\n      }\n    }\n\n    ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);\n\n    canvas.toBlob((blob) => {\n      if (!blob) return;\n      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      const a = document.createElement('a');\n      a.href = url;\n      a.download = 'grid.png';\n      document.body.appendChild(a);\n      a.click();\n      document.body.removeChild(a);\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n    }, 'image/png');\n  }\n\n  private loadFromPNG() {\n    const input = document.createElement('input');\n    input.type = 'file';\n    input.accept = 'image/png';\n    input.onchange = (e: Event) => {\n      const file = (e.target as HTMLInputElement).files?.[0];\n      if (!file) return;\n\n      const reader = new FileReader();\n      reader.onload = (event) => {\n        const img = new Image();\n        img.onload = () => {\n          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n          canvas.width = img.width;\n          canvas.height = img.height;\n          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n          if (!ctx) return;\n\n          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);\n          const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n          const data = imageData.data;\n\n          if (canvas.width !== this.config.gridWidth || canvas.height !== this.config.gridHeight) {\n            this.config.gridWidth = canvas.width;\n            this.config.gridHeight = canvas.height;\n          }\n\n          this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n            .fill(0)\n            .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n\n          for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n            for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n              const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n              const r = data[index];\n              const g = data[index + 1];\n              const b = data[index + 2];\n              const grayscale = Math.round((r + g + b) / 3);\n              const state = Math.round(grayscale * (this.config.numStates - 1) / 255);\n              this.cellStates[row][col] = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.config.numStates - 1, state));\n            }\n          }\n\n          this.updateGrid();\n        };\n        img.src = event.target?.result as string;\n      };\n      reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n    };\n    input.click();\n  }\n\n  private updateDrawStateBlade() {\n    if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n      this.drawStateBlade.dispose();\n    }\n\n    this.drawStateBlade = createDrawStateBlade({\n      numStates: this.config.numStates,\n      palette: this.config.palette,\n      drawState: this.config.drawState,\n      onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n        this.config.drawState = state;\n        if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n          this.drawStateBlade.update({\n            numStates: this.config.numStates,\n            palette: this.config.palette,\n            drawState: this.config.drawState,\n            onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n              this.config.drawState = state;\n            },\n          });\n        }\n      },\n    });\n    this.pane.add(this.drawStateBlade);\n  }\n\n  private initGrid() {\n    this.gridRenderer = new GridRenderer(); // This will be updated\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private updateGrid() {\n    // Update the Grid instance if grid type or scale changed\n    if (this.grid.type !== this.config.gridType || this.grid.scale !== this.config.gridScale) {\n        this.grid = this.createGrid(this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale);\n    }\n    \n    if (this.cellStates.length !== this.config.gridHeight || \n        this.cellStates[0]?.length !== this.config.gridWidth) {\n      this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n        .fill(0)\n        .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.edgeContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.highlightedEdge = null;\n    this.highlightedCell = null;\n    this.highlightedVertex = null;\n\n    // Calculate grid dimensions using the new Grid object\n    const pixelDimensions = this.grid.getGridPixelDimensions(this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight);\n    const gridWidth = pixelDimensions.width;\n    const gridHeight = pixelDimensions.height;\n\n    const offsetX = (this.app.screen.width - gridWidth) / 2;\n    const offsetY = (this.app.screen.height - gridHeight) / 2;\n\n    this.gridContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.gridContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.edgeContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.edgeContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.particleContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.particleContainer.y = offsetY;\n\n    const paletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.palette)) {\n      paletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    const edgePaletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.edgePalette)) {\n      edgePaletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    this.gridRenderer.render(\n      this.gridContainer,\n      this.edgeContainer,\n      this.config.gridWidth,\n      this.config.gridHeight,\n      this.config.gridType,\n      this.config.gridScale,\n      this.cellStates,\n      paletteStrings,\n      typeof this.config.edgeColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeColor : '#ffffff',\n      this.config.edgeWidth,\n      this.config.visualizeEdgeDelta,\n      edgePaletteStrings,\n      this.config.showCoordinates,\n      this.grid // Pass the Grid instance\n    );\n  }\n\n  private setupInteraction() {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseMove(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseDown(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e: MouseEvent) => e.preventDefault());\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n    const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n\n    this.mouseX = x;\n    this.mouseY = y;\n\n    if (this.highlightedEdge) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedEdge); this.highlightedEdge = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedCell) { this.gridContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedCell); this.highlightedCell = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedVertex) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedVertex); this.highlightedVertex = null; }\n\n    if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'draw') {\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedCell = this.gridRenderer.drawCellHighlight(\n          cellInfo, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, highlightColor, this.grid\n        );\n        this.gridContainer.addChild(this.highlightedCell);\n      }\n    } else {\n      const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (edgeInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedEdge = this.gridRenderer.drawEdge(edgeInfo, highlightColor);\n        this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedEdge);\n\n        const closestVertex = this.gridRenderer.getClosestVertex(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (closestVertex) {\n          this.highlightedVertex = this.gridRenderer.drawVertex(closestVertex, highlightColor);\n          if (this.highlightedVertex) {\n            this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedVertex);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseDown(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    \n    if (e.button === 0) { // Left click\n      if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'spawnParticle') {\n        const edgeX = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n        const edgeY = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n        \n        const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n          edgeX, edgeY, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (edgeInfo) {\n          this.particleSystem.spawnParticle(edgeInfo, edgeX, edgeY);\n          return;\n        }\n      } else { // Draw mode\n        const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n        const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n        const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (cellInfo) {\n          this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = this.config.drawState;\n          this.updateGrid();\n        }\n      }\n    } else if (e.button === 2) { // Right click: always clear cell\n      const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n      const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = 0;\n        this.updateGrid();\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// Initialize app when DOM is ready\nif (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => new GridApp());\n} else {\n  new GridApp();\n}"
  }
}
```
