// Import new Grid classes\n\ntype ColorValue = string | { r: number; g: number; b: number; a?: number };\n\ninterface PaletteData {\n  name: string;\n  colors: Record<string, string>;\n}\n\ntype LeftClickMode = 'draw' | 'spawnParticle';\ntype EdgeSelectionRule = 'randomNoBacktrack' | 'randomWithBacktrack' | 'clockwise' | 'counterClockwise' | 'followCursor' | 'avoidCursor';\n\ninterface AppConfig {\n  gridWidth: number;\n  gridHeight: number;\n  gridType: GridType;\n  gridScale: number;\n  numStates: number;\n  drawState: number;\n  palette: Record<number, ColorValue>;\n  selectedPalette: string;\n  edgePalette: Record<number, ColorValue>;\n  selectedEdgePalette: string;\n  edgeColor: ColorValue;\n  edgeWidth: number;\n  edgeHighlightColor: ColorValue;\n  visualizeEdgeDelta: boolean;\n  showCoordinates: boolean;\n  particleSpeed: number;\n  leftClickMode: LeftClickMode;\n  edgeSelectionRule: EdgeSelectionRule;\n}\n\nclass GridApp {\n  private app!: Application;\n  private gridRenderer!: GridRenderer;\n  private pane!: Pane;\n  private config: AppConfig;\n  private gridContainer!: Container;\n  private edgeContainer!: Container;\n  private particleContainer!: Container;\n  private highlightedEdge: Graphics | null = null;\n  private highlightedCell: Graphics | null = null;\n  private highlightedVertex: Graphics | null = null;\n  private cellStates: number[][] = [];\n  private drawStateBlade: DrawStateBladeApi | null = null;\n  private palettes: PaletteData[] = [];\n  private particleSystem!: ParticleSystem;\n  private mouseX: number = 0;\n  private mouseY: number = 0;\n  private grid: Grid; this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private applyEdgePalette(paletteName: string) {\n    const palette = this.palettes.find(p => p.name === paletteName);\n    if (!palette) initPixi() {\n    this.app = new Application();\n    await this.app.init({ \n      antialias: true, \n      resizeTo: window,\n      backgroundColor: 0x1a1a1a,\n    });\n    \n    const appElement = document.getElementById('app');\n    if (appElement) {\n      appElement.appendChild(this.app.canvas);\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer = new Container();\n    this.edgeContainer = new Container();\n    this.particleContainer = new Container();\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.gridContainer);\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.edgeContainer);\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.particleContainer);\n\n    this.particleSystem = new ParticleSystem(this.particleContainer);\n\n    this.app.ticker.add((ticker) => {\n      this.particleSystem.update(\n        ticker.deltaMS,\n        this.config.particleSpeed,\n        this.config.gridScale,\n        this.gridRenderer, // This will be refactored\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.config.gridType,\n        this.config.edgeSelectionRule,\n        this.mouseX,\n        this.mouseY\n      );\n    });\n  }\n\n  private initTweakpane() {\n    this.pane = new Pane({ title: 'Grid Controls' });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridWidth', {\n      min: 1, max: 80, step: 1, label: 'Grid Width',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridHeight', {\n      min: 1, max: 50, step: 1, label: 'Grid Height',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridType', {\n      options: { squares: 'squares', hexagons: 'hexagons', triangles: 'triangles' },\n      label: 'Grid Type',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridScale', {\n      min: 5, max: 100, step: 1, label: 'Grid Scale',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'numStates', {\n      min: 2, max: 8, step: 1, label: 'Number of States',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      if (this.config.drawState >= this.config.numStates) {\n        this.config.drawState = this.config.numStates - 1;\n      }\n      this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    const paletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n    this.palettes.forEach(palette => {\n      paletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedPalette', {\n      options: paletteOptions, label: 'Palette',\n    }).on('change', () => this.applyPalette(this.config.selectedPalette));\n\n    const edgePaletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n    this.palettes.forEach(palette => {\n      edgePaletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedEdgePalette', {\n      options: edgePaletteOptions, label: 'Edge Palette',\n    }).on('change', () => this.applyEdgePalette(this.config.selectedEdgePalette));\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeColor', {\n      label: 'Edge Color'\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeWidth', {\n      label: 'Edge Width', min: 0, max: 10, step: 0.1,\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'visualizeEdgeDelta', {\n      label: 'Visualize Edge Delta'\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'showCoordinates', {\n      label: 'Show Coordinates',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'leftClickMode', {\n      options: { 'Draw Cell': 'draw', 'Spawn Particle': 'spawnParticle' },\n      label: 'Left Click Mode',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'particleSpeed', {\n      min: 1, max: 400, step: 1, label: 'Particle Speed',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeSelectionRule', {\n      options: {\n        'Random (No Backtrack)': 'randomNoBacktrack',\n        'Random (With Backtrack)': 'randomWithBacktrack',\n        'Always Turn Clockwise': 'clockwise',\n        'Always Turn Counter-Clockwise': 'counterClockwise',\n        'Follow Cursor': 'followCursor',\n        'Avoid Cursor': 'avoidCursor',\n      },\n      label: 'Edge Selection Rule',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addButton({ title: 'Save to PNG', label: 'Save to PNG' }).on('click', () => this.saveToPNG());\n    this.pane.addButton({ title: 'Load from PNG', label: 'Load from PNG' }).on('click', () => this.loadFromPNG());\n  }\n\n  private saveToPNG() {\n    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n    canvas.width = this.config.gridWidth;\n    canvas.height = this.config.gridHeight;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    if (!ctx) return;\n\n    const imageData = ctx.createImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    const data = imageData.data;\n\n    for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n      for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n        const state = this.cellStates[row]?.[col] ?? 0;\n        const grayscale = Math.round(255 * state / (this.config.numStates - 1));\n        const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n        data[index] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 1] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 2] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 3] = 255;\n      }\n    }\n\n    ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);\n\n    canvas.toBlob((blob) => {\n      if (!blob) return;\n      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      const a = document.createElement('a');\n      a.href = url;\n      a.download = 'grid.png';\n      document.body.appendChild(a);\n      a.click();\n      document.body.removeChild(a);\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n    }, 'image/png');\n  }\n\n  private loadFromPNG() {\n    const input = document.createElement('input');\n    input.type = 'file';\n    input.accept = 'image/png';\n    input.onchange = (e: Event) => {\n      const file = (e.target as HTMLInputElement).files?.[0];\n      if (!file) return;\n\n      const reader = new FileReader();\n      reader.onload = (event) => {\n        const img = new Image();\n        img.onload = () => {\n          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n          canvas.width = img.width;\n          canvas.height = img.height;\n          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n          if (!ctx) return;\n\n          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);\n          const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n          const data = imageData.data;\n\n          if (canvas.width !== this.config.gridWidth || canvas.height !== this.config.gridHeight) {\n            this.config.gridWidth = canvas.width;\n            this.config.gridHeight = canvas.height;\n          }\n\n          this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n            .fill(0)\n            .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n\n          for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n            for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n              const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n              const r = data[index];\n              const g = data[index + 1];\n              const b = data[index + 2];\n              const grayscale = Math.round((r + g + b) / 3);\n              const state = Math.round(grayscale * (this.config.numStates - 1) / 255);\n              this.cellStates[row][col] = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.config.numStates - 1, state));\n            }\n          }\n\n          this.updateGrid();\n        };\n        img.src = event.target?.result as string;\n      };\n      reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n    };\n    input.click();\n  }\n\n  private updateDrawStateBlade() {\n    if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n      this.drawStateBlade.dispose();\n    }\n\n    this.drawStateBlade = createDrawStateBlade({\n      numStates: this.config.numStates,\n      palette: this.config.palette,\n      drawState: this.config.drawState,\n      onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n        this.config.drawState = state;\n        if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n          this.drawStateBlade.update({\n            numStates: this.config.numStates,\n            palette: this.config.palette,\n            drawState: this.config.drawState,\n            onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n              this.config.drawState = state;\n            },\n          });\n        }\n      },\n    });\n    this.pane.add(this.drawStateBlade);\n  }\n\n  private initGrid() {\n    this.gridRenderer = new GridRenderer(); // This will be updated\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private updateGrid() {\n    // Update the Grid instance if grid type or scale changed\n    if (this.grid.type !== this.config.gridType || this.grid.scale !== this.config.gridScale) {\n        this.grid = this.createGrid(this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale);\n    }\n    \n    if (this.cellStates.length !== this.config.gridHeight || \n        this.cellStates[0]?.length !== this.config.gridWidth) {\n      this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n        .fill(0)\n        .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.edgeContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.highlightedEdge = null;\n    this.highlightedCell = null;\n    this.highlightedVertex = null;\n\n    // Calculate grid dimensions using the new Grid object\n    const pixelDimensions = this.grid.getGridPixelDimensions(this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight);\n    const gridWidth = pixelDimensions.width;\n    const gridHeight = pixelDimensions.height;\n\n    const offsetX = (this.app.screen.width - gridWidth) / 2;\n    const offsetY = (this.app.screen.height - gridHeight) / 2;\n\n    this.gridContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.gridContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.edgeContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.edgeContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.particleContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.particleContainer.y = offsetY;\n\n    const paletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.palette)) {\n      paletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    const edgePaletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.edgePalette)) {\n      edgePaletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    this.gridRenderer.render(\n      this.gridContainer,\n      this.edgeContainer,\n      this.config.gridWidth,\n      this.config.gridHeight,\n      this.config.gridType,\n      this.config.gridScale,\n      this.cellStates,\n      paletteStrings,\n      typeof this.config.edgeColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeColor : '#ffffff',\n      this.config.edgeWidth,\n      this.config.showCoordinates,\n      this.grid // Pass the Grid instance\n    );\n  }\n\n  private setupInteraction() {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseMove(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseDown(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e: MouseEvent) => e.preventDefault());\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n    const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n\n    this.mouseX = x;\n    this.mouseY = y;\n\n    if (this.highlightedEdge) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedEdge); this.highlightedEdge = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedCell) { this.gridContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedCell); this.highlightedCell = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedVertex) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedVertex); this.highlightedVertex = null; }\n\n    if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'draw') {\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedCell = this.gridRenderer.drawCellHighlight(\n          cellInfo, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, highlightColor, this.grid\n        );\n        this.gridContainer.addChild(this.highlightedCell);\n      }\n    } else {\n      const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (edgeInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedEdge = this.gridRenderer.drawEdge(edgeInfo, highlightColor);\n        this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedEdge);\n\n        const closestVertex = this.gridRenderer.getClosestVertex(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (closestVertex) {\n          this.highlightedVertex = this.gridRenderer.drawVertex(closestVertex, highlightColor);\n          if (this.highlightedVertex) {\n            this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedVertex);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseDown(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    \n    if (e.button === 0) { // Left click\n      if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'spawnParticle') {\n        const edgeX = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n        const edgeY = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n        \n        const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n          edgeX, edgeY, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (edgeInfo) {\n          this.particleSystem.spawnParticle(edgeInfo, edgeX, edgeY);\n          return;\n        }\n      } else { // Draw mode\n        const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n        const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n        const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (cellInfo) {\n          this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = this.config.drawState;\n          this.updateGrid();\n        }\n      }\n    } else if (e.button === 2) { // Right click: always clear cell\n      const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n      const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = 0;\n        this.updateGrid();\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// Initialize app when DOM is ready\nif (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => new GridApp());\n} else {\n  new GridApp();\n}"
  }
}
```

// Import new Grid classes\n\ntype ColorValue = string | { r: number; g: number; b: number; a?: number };\n\ninterface PaletteData {\n  name: string;\n  colors: Record<string, string>;\n}\n\ntype LeftClickMode = 'draw' | 'spawnParticle';\ntype EdgeSelectionRule = 'randomNoBacktrack' | 'randomWithBacktrack' | 'clockwise' | 'counterClockwise' | 'followCursor' | 'avoidCursor';\n\ninterface AppConfig {\n  gridWidth: number;\n  gridHeight: number;\n  gridType: GridType;\n  gridScale: number;\n  numStates: number;\n  drawState: number;\n  palette: Record<number, ColorValue>;\n  selectedPalette: string;\n  edgePalette: Record<number, ColorValue>;\n  selectedEdgePalette: string;\n  edgeColor: ColorValue;\n  edgeWidth: number;\n  edgeHighlightColor: ColorValue;\n  visualizeEdgeDelta: boolean;\n  showCoordinates: boolean;\n  particleSpeed: number;\n  leftClickMode: LeftClickMode;\n  edgeSelectionRule: EdgeSelectionRule;\n}\n\nclass GridApp {\n  private app!: Application;\n  private gridRenderer!: GridRenderer;\n  private pane!: Pane;\n  private config: AppConfig;\n  private gridContainer!: Container;\n  private edgeContainer!: Container;\n  private particleContainer!: Container;\n  private highlightedEdge: Graphics | null = null;\n  private highlightedCell: Graphics | null = null;\n  private highlightedVertex: Graphics | null = null;\n  private cellStates: number[][] = [];\n  private drawStateBlade: DrawStateBladeApi | null = null;\n  private palettes: PaletteData[] = [];\n  private particleSystem!: ParticleSystem;\n  private mouseX: number = 0;\n  private mouseY: number = 0;\n  private grid: Grid; initPixi() {\n    this.app = new Application();\n    await this.app.init({ \n      antialias: true, \n      resizeTo: window,\n      backgroundColor: 0x1a1a1a,\n    });\n    \n    const appElement = document.getElementById('app');\n    if (appElement) {\n      appElement.appendChild(this.app.canvas);\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer = new Container();\n    this.edgeContainer = new Container();\n    this.particleContainer = new Container();\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.gridContainer);\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.edgeContainer);\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.particleContainer);\n\n    this.particleSystem = new ParticleSystem(this.particleContainer);\n\n    this.app.ticker.add((ticker) => {\n      this.particleSystem.update(\n        ticker.deltaMS,\n        this.config.particleSpeed,\n        this.config.gridScale,\n        this.gridRenderer, // This will be refactored\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.config.gridType,\n        this.config.edgeSelectionRule,\n        this.mouseX,\n        this.mouseY\n      );\n    });\n  }\n\n  private initTweakpane() {\n    this.pane = new Pane({ title: 'Grid Controls' });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridWidth', {\n      min: 1, max: 80, step: 1, label: 'Grid Width',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridHeight', {\n      min: 1, max: 50, step: 1, label: 'Grid Height',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridType', {\n      options: { squares: 'squares', hexagons: 'hexagons', triangles: 'triangles' },\n      label: 'Grid Type',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridScale', {\n      min: 5, max: 100, step: 1, label: 'Grid Scale',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'numStates', {\n      min: 2, max: 8, step: 1, label: 'Number of States',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      if (this.config.drawState >= this.config.numStates) {\n        this.config.drawState = this.config.numStates - 1;\n      }\n      this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    const paletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n    this.palettes.forEach(palette => {\n      paletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedPalette', {\n      options: paletteOptions, label: 'Palette',\n    }).on('change', () => this.applyPalette(this.config.selectedPalette));\n\n    const edgePaletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n    this.palettes.forEach(palette => {\n      edgePaletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedEdgePalette', {\n      options: edgePaletteOptions, label: 'Edge Palette',\n    }).on('change', () => this.applyEdgePalette(this.config.selectedEdgePalette));\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeColor', {\n      label: 'Edge Color'\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeWidth', {\n      label: 'Edge Width', min: 0, max: 10, step: 0.1,\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'visualizeEdgeDelta', {\n      label: 'Visualize Edge Delta'\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'showCoordinates', {\n      label: 'Show Coordinates',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'leftClickMode', {\n      options: { 'Draw Cell': 'draw', 'Spawn Particle': 'spawnParticle' },\n      label: 'Left Click Mode',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'particleSpeed', {\n      min: 1, max: 400, step: 1, label: 'Particle Speed',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeSelectionRule', {\n      options: {\n        'Random (No Backtrack)': 'randomNoBacktrack',\n        'Random (With Backtrack)': 'randomWithBacktrack',\n        'Always Turn Clockwise': 'clockwise',\n        'Always Turn Counter-Clockwise': 'counterClockwise',\n        'Follow Cursor': 'followCursor',\n        'Avoid Cursor': 'avoidCursor',\n      },\n      label: 'Edge Selection Rule',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addButton({ title: 'Save to PNG', label: 'Save to PNG' }).on('click', () => this.saveToPNG());\n    this.pane.addButton({ title: 'Load from PNG', label: 'Load from PNG' }).on('click', () => this.loadFromPNG());\n  }\n\n  private saveToPNG() {\n    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n    canvas.width = this.config.gridWidth;\n    canvas.height = this.config.gridHeight;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    if (!ctx) return;\n\n    const imageData = ctx.createImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    const data = imageData.data;\n\n    for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n      for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n        const state = this.cellStates[row]?.[col] ?? 0;\n        const grayscale = Math.round(255 * state / (this.config.numStates - 1));\n        const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n        data[index] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 1] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 2] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 3] = 255;\n      }\n    }\n\n    ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);\n\n    canvas.toBlob((blob) => {\n      if (!blob) return;\n      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      const a = document.createElement('a');\n      a.href = url;\n      a.download = 'grid.png';\n      document.body.appendChild(a);\n      a.click();\n      document.body.removeChild(a);\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n    }, 'image/png');\n  }\n\n  private loadFromPNG() {\n    const input = document.createElement('input');\n    input.type = 'file';\n    input.accept = 'image/png';\n    input.onchange = (e: Event) => {\n      const file = (e.target as HTMLInputElement).files?.[0];\n      if (!file) return;\n\n      const reader = new FileReader();\n      reader.onload = (event) => {\n        const img = new Image();\n        img.onload = () => {\n          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n          canvas.width = img.width;\n          canvas.height = img.height;\n          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n          if (!ctx) return;\n\n          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);\n          const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n          const data = imageData.data;\n\n          if (canvas.width !== this.config.gridWidth || canvas.height !== this.config.gridHeight) {\n            this.config.gridWidth = canvas.width;\n            this.config.gridHeight = canvas.height;\n          }\n\n          this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n            .fill(0)\n            .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n\n          for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n            for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n              const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n              const r = data[index];\n              const g = data[index + 1];\n              const b = data[index + 2];\n              const grayscale = Math.round((r + g + b) / 3);\n              const state = Math.round(grayscale * (this.config.numStates - 1) / 255);\n              this.cellStates[row][col] = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.config.numStates - 1, state));\n            }\n          }\n\n          this.updateGrid();\n        };\n        img.src = event.target?.result as string;\n      };\n      reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n    };\n    input.click();\n  }\n\n  private updateDrawStateBlade() {\n    if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n      this.drawStateBlade.dispose();\n    }\n\n    this.drawStateBlade = createDrawStateBlade({\n      numStates: this.config.numStates,\n      palette: this.config.palette,\n      drawState: this.config.drawState,\n      onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n        this.config.drawState = state;\n        if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n          this.drawStateBlade.update({\n            numStates: this.config.numStates,\n            palette: this.config.palette,\n            drawState: this.config.drawState,\n            onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n              this.config.drawState = state;\n            },\n          });\n        }\n      },\n    });\n    this.pane.add(this.drawStateBlade);\n  }\n\n  private initGrid() {\n    this.gridRenderer = new GridRenderer(); // This will be updated\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private updateGrid() {\n    // Update the Grid instance if grid type or scale changed\n    if (this.grid.type !== this.config.gridType || this.grid.scale !== this.config.gridScale) {\n        this.grid = this.createGrid(this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale);\n    }\n    \n    if (this.cellStates.length !== this.config.gridHeight || \n        this.cellStates[0]?.length !== this.config.gridWidth) {\n      this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n        .fill(0)\n        .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.edgeContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.highlightedEdge = null;\n    this.highlightedCell = null;\n    this.highlightedVertex = null;\n\n    // Calculate grid dimensions using the new Grid object\n    const pixelDimensions = this.grid.getGridPixelDimensions(this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight);\n    const gridWidth = pixelDimensions.width;\n    const gridHeight = pixelDimensions.height;\n\n    const offsetX = (this.app.screen.width - gridWidth) / 2;\n    const offsetY = (this.app.screen.height - gridHeight) / 2;\n\n    this.gridContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.gridContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.edgeContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.edgeContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.particleContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.particleContainer.y = offsetY;\n\n    const paletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.palette)) {\n      paletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    const edgePaletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.edgePalette)) {\n      edgePaletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    this.gridRenderer.render(\n      this.gridContainer,\n      this.edgeContainer,\n      this.config.gridWidth,\n      this.config.gridHeight,\n      this.config.gridType,\n      this.config.gridScale,\n      this.cellStates,\n      paletteStrings,\n      typeof this.config.edgeColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeColor : '#ffffff',\n      this.config.edgeWidth,\n      this.config.showCoordinates,\n      this.grid // Pass the Grid instance\n    );\n  }\n\n  private setupInteraction() {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseMove(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseDown(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e: MouseEvent) => e.preventDefault());\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n    const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n\n    this.mouseX = x;\n    this.mouseY = y;\n\n    if (this.highlightedEdge) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedEdge); this.highlightedEdge = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedCell) { this.gridContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedCell); this.highlightedCell = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedVertex) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedVertex); this.highlightedVertex = null; }\n\n    if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'draw') {\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedCell = this.gridRenderer.drawCellHighlight(\n          cellInfo, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, highlightColor, this.grid\n        );\n        this.gridContainer.addChild(this.highlightedCell);\n      }\n    } else {\n      const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (edgeInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedEdge = this.gridRenderer.drawEdge(edgeInfo, highlightColor);\n        this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedEdge);\n\n        const closestVertex = this.gridRenderer.getClosestVertex(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (closestVertex) {\n          this.highlightedVertex = this.gridRenderer.drawVertex(closestVertex, highlightColor);\n          if (this.highlightedVertex) {\n            this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedVertex);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseDown(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    \n    if (e.button === 0) { // Left click\n      if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'spawnParticle') {\n        const edgeX = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n        const edgeY = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n        \n        const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n          edgeX, edgeY, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (edgeInfo) {\n          this.particleSystem.spawnParticle(edgeInfo, edgeX, edgeY);\n          return;\n        }\n      } else { // Draw mode\n        const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n        const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n        const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (cellInfo) {\n          this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = this.config.drawState;\n          this.updateGrid();\n        }\n      }\n    } else if (e.button === 2) { // Right click: always clear cell\n      const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n      const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = 0;\n        this.updateGrid();\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// Initialize app when DOM is ready\nif (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => new GridApp());\n} else {\n  new GridApp();\n}"
  }
}
```

// Import new Grid classes\n\ntype ColorValue = string | { r: number; g: number; b: number; a?: number };\n\ninterface PaletteData {\n  name: string;\n  colors: Record<string, string>;\n}\n\ntype LeftClickMode = 'draw' | 'spawnParticle';\ntype EdgeSelectionRule = 'randomNoBacktrack' | 'randomWithBacktrack' | 'clockwise' | 'counterClockwise' | 'followCursor' | 'avoidCursor';\n\ninterface AppConfig {\n  gridWidth: number;\n  gridHeight: number;\n  gridType: GridType;\n  gridScale: number;\n  numStates: number;\n  drawState: number;\n  palette: Record<number, ColorValue>;\n  selectedPalette: string;\n  edgePalette: Record<number, ColorValue>;\n  selectedEdgePalette: string;\n  edgeColor: ColorValue;\n  edgeWidth: number;\n  edgeHighlightColor: ColorValue;\n  visualizeEdgeDelta: boolean;\n  showCoordinates: boolean;\n  particleSpeed: number;\n  leftClickMode: LeftClickMode;\n  edgeSelectionRule: EdgeSelectionRule;\n}\n\nclass GridApp {\n  private app!: Application;\n  private gridRenderer!: GridRenderer;\n  private pane!: Pane;\n  private config: AppConfig;\n  private gridContainer!: Container;\n  private edgeContainer!: Container;\n  private particleContainer!: Container;\n  private highlightedEdge: Graphics | null = null;\n  private highlightedCell: Graphics | null = null;\n  private highlightedVertex: Graphics | null = null;\n  private cellStates: number[][] = [];\n  private drawStateBlade: DrawStateBladeApi | null = null;\n  private palettes: PaletteData[] = [];\n  private particleSystem!: ParticleSystem;\n  private mouseX: number = 0;\n  private mouseY: number = 0;\n  private grid: Grid; // Instance of the abstract Grid\n\n  constructor() {\n    this.palettes = palettesData.palettes;\n    \n    const defaultPalette = this.palettes[0];\n    const initialPalette: Record<number, ColorValue> = {};\n    Object.keys(defaultPalette.colors).forEach(key => {\n      initialPalette[parseInt(key)] = defaultPalette.colors[key];\n    });\n\n    const initialEdgePalette: Record<number, ColorValue> = {};\n    Object.keys(defaultPalette.colors).forEach(key => {\n      initialEdgePalette[parseInt(key)] = defaultPalette.colors[key];\n    });\n\n    this.config = {\n      gridWidth: 25,\n      gridHeight: 18,\n      gridType: 'hexagons',\n      gridScale: 30,\n      numStates: 8,\n      drawState: 7,\n      palette: initialPalette,\n      selectedPalette: defaultPalette.name,\n      edgePalette: initialEdgePalette,\n      selectedEdgePalette: defaultPalette.name,\n      edgeColor: '#ffffff',\n      edgeWidth: 1,\n      edgeHighlightColor: '#ffff00',\n      visualizeEdgeDelta: false,\n      showCoordinates: false,\n      particleSpeed: 100,\n      leftClickMode: 'spawnParticle', // Fixed: was randomNoBacktrack\n      edgeSelectionRule: 'randomNoBacktrack', // Fixed: was spawnParticle\n    };\n\n    this.grid = this.createGrid(this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale); this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private applyEdgePalette(paletteName: string) {\n    const palette = this.palettes.find(p => p.name === paletteName);\n    if (!palette) initPixi() {\n    this.app = new Application();\n    await this.app.init({ \n      antialias: true, \n      resizeTo: window,\n      backgroundColor: 0x1a1a1a,\n    });\n    \n    const appElement = document.getElementById('app');\n    if (appElement) {\n      appElement.appendChild(this.app.canvas);\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer = new Container();\n    this.edgeContainer = new Container();\n    this.particleContainer = new Container();\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.gridContainer);\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.edgeContainer);\n    this.app.stage.addChild(this.particleContainer);\n\n    this.particleSystem = new ParticleSystem(this.particleContainer);\n\n    this.app.ticker.add((ticker) => {\n      this.particleSystem.update(\n        ticker.deltaMS,\n        this.config.particleSpeed,\n        this.config.gridScale,\n        this.gridRenderer, // This will be refactored\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.config.gridType,\n        this.config.edgeSelectionRule,\n        this.mouseX,\n        this.mouseY\n      );\n    });\n  }\n\n  private initTweakpane() {\n    this.pane = new Pane({ title: 'Grid Controls' });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridWidth', {\n      min: 1, max: 80, step: 1, label: 'Grid Width',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridHeight', {\n      min: 1, max: 50, step: 1, label: 'Grid Height',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridType', {\n      options: { squares: 'squares', hexagons: 'hexagons', triangles: 'triangles' },\n      label: 'Grid Type',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridScale', {\n      min: 5, max: 100, step: 1, label: 'Grid Scale',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'numStates', {\n      min: 2, max: 8, step: 1, label: 'Number of States',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      if (this.config.drawState >= this.config.numStates) {\n        this.config.drawState = this.config.numStates - 1;\n      }\n      this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    const paletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n    this.palettes.forEach(palette => {\n      paletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedPalette', {\n      options: paletteOptions, label: 'Palette',\n    }).on('change', () => this.applyPalette(this.config.selectedPalette));\n\n    const edgePaletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n    this.palettes.forEach(palette => {\n      edgePaletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedEdgePalette', {\n      options: edgePaletteOptions, label: 'Edge Palette',\n    }).on('change', () => this.applyEdgePalette(this.config.selectedEdgePalette));\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeColor', {\n      label: 'Edge Color'\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeWidth', {\n      label: 'Edge Width', min: 0, max: 10, step: 0.1,\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'visualizeEdgeDelta', {\n      label: 'Visualize Edge Delta'\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'showCoordinates', {\n      label: 'Show Coordinates',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'leftClickMode', {\n      options: { 'Draw Cell': 'draw', 'Spawn Particle': 'spawnParticle' },\n      label: 'Left Click Mode',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'particleSpeed', {\n      min: 1, max: 400, step: 1, label: 'Particle Speed',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeSelectionRule', {\n      options: {\n        'Random (No Backtrack)': 'randomNoBacktrack',\n        'Random (With Backtrack)': 'randomWithBacktrack',\n        'Always Turn Clockwise': 'clockwise',\n        'Always Turn Counter-Clockwise': 'counterClockwise',\n        'Follow Cursor': 'followCursor',\n        'Avoid Cursor': 'avoidCursor',\n      },\n      label: 'Edge Selection Rule',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addButton({ title: 'Save to PNG', label: 'Save to PNG' }).on('click', () => this.saveToPNG());\n    this.pane.addButton({ title: 'Load from PNG', label: 'Load from PNG' }).on('click', () => this.loadFromPNG());\n  }\n\n  private saveToPNG() {\n    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n    canvas.width = this.config.gridWidth;\n    canvas.height = this.config.gridHeight;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    if (!ctx) return;\n\n    const imageData = ctx.createImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    const data = imageData.data;\n\n    for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n      for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n        const state = this.cellStates[row]?.[col] ?? 0;\n        const grayscale = Math.round(255 * state / (this.config.numStates - 1));\n        const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n        data[index] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 1] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 2] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 3] = 255;\n      }\n    }\n\n    ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);\n\n    canvas.toBlob((blob) => {\n      if (!blob) return;\n      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      const a = document.createElement('a');\n      a.href = url;\n      a.download = 'grid.png';\n      document.body.appendChild(a);\n      a.click();\n      document.body.removeChild(a);\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n    }, 'image/png');\n  }\n\n  private loadFromPNG() {\n    const input = document.createElement('input');\n    input.type = 'file';\n    input.accept = 'image/png';\n    input.onchange = (e: Event) => {\n      const file = (e.target as HTMLInputElement).files?.[0];\n      if (!file) return;\n\n      const reader = new FileReader();\n      reader.onload = (event) => {\n        const img = new Image();\n        img.onload = () => {\n          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n          canvas.width = img.width;\n          canvas.height = img.height;\n          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n          if (!ctx) return;\n\n          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);\n          const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n          const data = imageData.data;\n\n          if (canvas.width !== this.config.gridWidth || canvas.height !== this.config.gridHeight) {\n            this.config.gridWidth = canvas.width;\n            this.config.gridHeight = canvas.height;\n          }\n\n          this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n            .fill(0)\n            .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n\n          for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n            for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n              const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n              const r = data[index];\n              const g = data[index + 1];\n              const b = data[index + 2];\n              const grayscale = Math.round((r + g + b) / 3);\n              const state = Math.round(grayscale * (this.config.numStates - 1) / 255);\n              this.cellStates[row][col] = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.config.numStates - 1, state));\n            }\n          }\n\n          this.updateGrid();\n        };\n        img.src = event.target?.result as string;\n      };\n      reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n    };\n    input.click();\n  }\n\n  private updateDrawStateBlade() {\n    if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n      this.drawStateBlade.dispose();\n    }\n\n    this.drawStateBlade = createDrawStateBlade({\n      numStates: this.config.numStates,\n      palette: this.config.palette,\n      drawState: this.config.drawState,\n      onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n        this.config.drawState = state;\n        if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n          this.drawStateBlade.update({\n            numStates: this.config.numStates,\n            palette: this.config.palette,\n            drawState: this.config.drawState,\n            onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n              this.config.drawState = state;\n            },\n          });\n        }\n      },\n    });\n    this.pane.add(this.drawStateBlade);\n  }\n\n  private initGrid() {\n    this.gridRenderer = new GridRenderer(); // This will be updated\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private updateGrid() {\n    // Update the Grid instance if grid type or scale changed\n    if (this.grid.type !== this.config.gridType || this.grid.scale !== this.config.gridScale) {\n        this.grid = this.createGrid(this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale);\n    }\n    \n    if (this.cellStates.length !== this.config.gridHeight || \n        this.cellStates[0]?.length !== this.config.gridWidth) {\n      this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n        .fill(0)\n        .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.edgeContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.highlightedEdge = null;\n    this.highlightedCell = null;\n    this.highlightedVertex = null;\n\n    // Calculate grid dimensions using the new Grid object\n    const pixelDimensions = this.grid.getGridPixelDimensions(this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight);\n    const gridWidth = pixelDimensions.width;\n    const gridHeight = pixelDimensions.height;\n\n    const offsetX = (this.app.screen.width - gridWidth) / 2;\n    const offsetY = (this.app.screen.height - gridHeight) / 2;\n\n    this.gridContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.gridContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.edgeContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.edgeContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.particleContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.particleContainer.y = offsetY;\n\n    const paletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.palette)) {\n      paletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    const edgePaletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.edgePalette)) {\n      edgePaletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    this.gridRenderer.render(\n      this.gridContainer,\n      this.edgeContainer,\n      this.config.gridWidth,\n      this.config.gridHeight,\n      this.config.gridType,\n      this.config.gridScale,\n      this.cellStates,\n      paletteStrings,\n      typeof this.config.edgeColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeColor : '#ffffff',\n      this.config.edgeWidth,\n      this.config.visualizeEdgeDelta,\n      edgePaletteStrings,\n      this.config.showCoordinates,\n      this.grid // Pass the Grid instance\n    );\n  }\n\n  private setupInteraction() {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseMove(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseDown(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e: MouseEvent) => e.preventDefault());\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n    const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n\n    this.mouseX = x;\n    this.mouseY = y;\n\n    if (this.highlightedEdge) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedEdge); this.highlightedEdge = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedCell) { this.gridContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedCell); this.highlightedCell = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedVertex) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedVertex); this.highlightedVertex = null; }\n\n    if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'draw') {\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedCell = this.gridRenderer.drawCellHighlight(\n          cellInfo, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, highlightColor, this.grid\n        );\n        this.gridContainer.addChild(this.highlightedCell);\n      }\n    } else {\n      const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (edgeInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedEdge = this.gridRenderer.drawEdge(edgeInfo, highlightColor);\n        this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedEdge);\n\n        const closestVertex = this.gridRenderer.getClosestVertex(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (closestVertex) {\n          this.highlightedVertex = this.gridRenderer.drawVertex(closestVertex, highlightColor);\n          if (this.highlightedVertex) {\n            this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedVertex);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseDown(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    \n    if (e.button === 0) { // Left click\n      if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'spawnParticle') {\n        const edgeX = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n        const edgeY = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n        \n        const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n          edgeX, edgeY, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (edgeInfo) {\n          this.particleSystem.spawnParticle(edgeInfo, edgeX, edgeY);\n          return;\n        }\n      } else { // Draw mode\n        const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n        const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n        const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (cellInfo) {\n          this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = this.config.drawState;\n          this.updateGrid();\n        }\n      }\n    } else if (e.button === 2) { // Right click: always clear cell\n      const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n      const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = 0;\n        this.updateGrid();\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// Initialize app when DOM is ready\nif (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => new GridApp());\n} else {\n  new GridApp();\n}"
  }
}
```

initPixi() {\n    this.app = new Application();\n    await this.app.init({ \n      antialias: true, \n      resizeTo: window,\n      backgroundColor: 0x1a1a1a,\n    });\n    \n    const appElement = document.getElementById('app');\n    if (appElement) {\n      appElement.appendChild(this.app.canvas);\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer = new Container();\n    this.edgeContainer = new Container();\n this.app.stage.addChild(this.particleContainer);\n\n    this.particleSystem = new ParticleSystem(this.particleContainer);\n\n    this.app.ticker.add((ticker) => {\n      this.particleSystem.update(\n        ticker.deltaMS,\n        this.config.particleSpeed,\n        this.config.gridScale,\n        this.gridRenderer, // This will be refactored\n        this.config.gridWidth,\n        this.config.gridHeight,\n        this.config.gridType,\n        this.config.edgeSelectionRule,\n        this.mouseX,\n        this.mouseY\n      );\n    });\n  }\n\n  private initTweakpane() {\n    this.pane = new Pane({ title: 'Grid Controls' });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridWidth', {\n      min: 1, max: 80, step: 1, label: 'Grid Width',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridHeight', {\n      min: 1, max: 50, step: 1, label: 'Grid Height',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridType', {\n      options: { squares: 'squares', hexagons: 'hexagons', triangles: 'triangles' },\n      label: 'Grid Type',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'gridScale', {\n      min: 5, max: 100, step: 1, label: 'Grid Scale',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'numStates', {\n      min: 2, max: 8, step: 1, label: 'Number of States',\n    }).on('change', () => {\n      if (this.config.drawState >= this.config.numStates) {\n        this.config.drawState = this.config.numStates - 1;\n      }\n      this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n      this.updateGrid();\n    });\n\n    const paletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n    this.palettes.forEach(palette => {\n      paletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedPalette', {\n      options: paletteOptions, label: 'Palette',\n    }).on('change', () => this.applyPalette(this.config.selectedPalette));\n\n    const edgePaletteOptions: Record<string, string> = {};\n    this.palettes.forEach(palette => {\n      edgePaletteOptions[palette.name] = palette.name;\n    });\n    \n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'selectedEdgePalette', {\n      options: edgePaletteOptions, label: 'Edge Palette',\n    }).on('change', () => this.applyEdgePalette(this.config.selectedEdgePalette));\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeColor', {\n      label: 'Edge Color'\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeWidth', {\n      label: 'Edge Width', min: 0, max: 10, step: 0.1,\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'visualizeEdgeDelta', {\n      label: 'Visualize Edge Delta'\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.updateDrawStateBlade();\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'showCoordinates', {\n      label: 'Show Coordinates',\n    }).on('change', () => this.updateGrid());\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'leftClickMode', {\n      options: { 'Draw Cell': 'draw', 'Spawn Particle': 'spawnParticle' },\n      label: 'Left Click Mode',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'particleSpeed', {\n      min: 1, max: 400, step: 1, label: 'Particle Speed',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addBinding(this.config, 'edgeSelectionRule', {\n      options: {\n        'Random (No Backtrack)': 'randomNoBacktrack',\n        'Random (With Backtrack)': 'randomWithBacktrack',\n        'Always Turn Clockwise': 'clockwise',\n        'Always Turn Counter-Clockwise': 'counterClockwise',\n        'Follow Cursor': 'followCursor',\n        'Avoid Cursor': 'avoidCursor',\n      },\n      label: 'Edge Selection Rule',\n    });\n\n    this.pane.addButton({ title: 'Save to PNG', label: 'Save to PNG' }).on('click', () => this.saveToPNG());\n    this.pane.addButton({ title: 'Load from PNG', label: 'Load from PNG' }).on('click', () => this.loadFromPNG());\n  }\n\n  private saveToPNG() {\n    const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n    canvas.width = this.config.gridWidth;\n    canvas.height = this.config.gridHeight;\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n    if (!ctx) return;\n\n    const imageData = ctx.createImageData(canvas.width, canvas.height);\n    const data = imageData.data;\n\n    for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n      for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n        const state = this.cellStates[row]?.[col] ?? 0;\n        const grayscale = Math.round(255 * state / (this.config.numStates - 1));\n        const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n        data[index] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 1] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 2] = grayscale;\n        data[index + 3] = 255;\n      }\n    }\n\n    ctx.putImageData(imageData, 0, 0);\n\n    canvas.toBlob((blob) => {\n      if (!blob) return;\n      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n      const a = document.createElement('a');\n      a.href = url;\n      a.download = 'grid.png';\n      document.body.appendChild(a);\n      a.click();\n      document.body.removeChild(a);\n      URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n    }, 'image/png');\n  }\n\n  private loadFromPNG() {\n    const input = document.createElement('input');\n    input.type = 'file';\n    input.accept = 'image/png';\n    input.onchange = (e: Event) => {\n      const file = (e.target as HTMLInputElement).files?.[0];\n      if (!file) return;\n\n      const reader = new FileReader();\n      reader.onload = (event) => {\n        const img = new Image();\n        img.onload = () => {\n          const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');\n          canvas.width = img.width;\n          canvas.height = img.height;\n          const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n          if (!ctx) return;\n\n          ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0);\n          const imageData = ctx.getImageData(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n          const data = imageData.data;\n\n          if (canvas.width !== this.config.gridWidth || canvas.height !== this.config.gridHeight) {\n            this.config.gridWidth = canvas.width;\n            this.config.gridHeight = canvas.height;\n          }\n\n          this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n            .fill(0)\n            .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n\n          for (let row = 0; row < this.config.gridHeight; row++) {\n            for (let col = 0; col < this.config.gridWidth; col++) {\n              const index = (row * canvas.width + col) * 4;\n              const r = data[index];\n              const g = data[index + 1];\n              const b = data[index + 2];\n              const grayscale = Math.round((r + g + b) / 3);\n              const state = Math.round(grayscale * (this.config.numStates - 1) / 255);\n              this.cellStates[row][col] = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.config.numStates - 1, state));\n            }\n          }\n\n          this.updateGrid();\n        };\n        img.src = event.target?.result as string;\n      };\n      reader.readAsDataURL(file);\n    };\n    input.click();\n  }\n\n  private updateDrawStateBlade() {\n    if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n      this.drawStateBlade.dispose();\n    }\n\n    this.drawStateBlade = createDrawStateBlade({\n      numStates: this.config.numStates,\n      palette: this.config.palette,\n      drawState: this.config.drawState,\n      onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n        this.config.drawState = state;\n        if (this.drawStateBlade) {\n          this.drawStateBlade.update({\n            numStates: this.config.numStates,\n            palette: this.config.palette,\n            drawState: this.config.drawState,\n            onStateChange: (state: number) => {\n              this.config.drawState = state;\n            },\n          });\n        }\n      },\n    });\n    this.pane.add(this.drawStateBlade);\n  }\n\n  private initGrid() {\n    this.gridRenderer = new GridRenderer(); // This will be updated\n    this.updateGrid();\n  }\n\n  private updateGrid() {\n    // Update the Grid instance if grid type or scale changed\n    if (this.grid.type !== this.config.gridType || this.grid.scale !== this.config.gridScale) {\n        this.grid = this.createGrid(this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale);\n    }\n    \n    if (this.cellStates.length !== this.config.gridHeight || \n        this.cellStates[0]?.length !== this.config.gridWidth) {\n      this.cellStates = Array(this.config.gridHeight)\n        .fill(0)\n        .map(() => Array(this.config.gridWidth).fill(0));\n    }\n\n    this.gridContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.edgeContainer.removeChildren();\n    this.highlightedEdge = null;\n    this.highlightedCell = null;\n    this.highlightedVertex = null;\n\n    // Calculate grid dimensions using the new Grid object\n    const pixelDimensions = this.grid.getGridPixelDimensions(this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight);\n    const gridWidth = pixelDimensions.width;\n    const gridHeight = pixelDimensions.height;\n\n    const offsetX = (this.app.screen.width - gridWidth) / 2;\n    const offsetY = (this.app.screen.height - gridHeight) / 2;\n\n    this.gridContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.gridContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.edgeContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.edgeContainer.y = offsetY;\n    this.particleContainer.x = offsetX;\n    this.particleContainer.y = offsetY;\n\n    const paletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.palette)) {\n      paletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    const edgePaletteStrings: Record<number, string> = {};\n    for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(this.config.edgePalette)) {\n      edgePaletteStrings[parseInt(key)] = typeof value === 'string' ? value : '#000000';\n    }\n\n    this.gridRenderer.render(\n      this.gridContainer,\n      this.edgeContainer,\n      this.config.gridWidth,\n      this.config.gridHeight,\n      this.config.gridType,\n      this.config.gridScale,\n      this.cellStates,\n      paletteStrings,\n      typeof this.config.edgeColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeColor : '#ffffff',\n      this.config.edgeWidth,\n      this.config.visualizeEdgeDelta,\n      edgePaletteStrings,\n      this.config.showCoordinates,\n      this.grid // Pass the Grid instance\n    );\n  }\n\n  private setupInteraction() {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseMove(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e: MouseEvent) => this.handleMouseDown(e));\n    canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e: MouseEvent) => e.preventDefault());\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n    const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n\n    this.mouseX = x;\n    this.mouseY = y;\n\n    if (this.highlightedEdge) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedEdge); this.highlightedEdge = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedCell) { this.gridContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedCell); this.highlightedCell = null; }\n    if (this.highlightedVertex) { this.edgeContainer.removeChild(this.highlightedVertex); this.highlightedVertex = null; }\n\n    if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'draw') {\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedCell = this.gridRenderer.drawCellHighlight(\n          cellInfo, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, highlightColor, this.grid\n        );\n        this.gridContainer.addChild(this.highlightedCell);\n      }\n    } else {\n      const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (edgeInfo) {\n        const highlightColor = typeof this.config.edgeHighlightColor === 'string' ? this.config.edgeHighlightColor : '#ffff00';\n        this.highlightedEdge = this.gridRenderer.drawEdge(edgeInfo, highlightColor);\n        this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedEdge);\n\n        const closestVertex = this.gridRenderer.getClosestVertex(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (closestVertex) {\n          this.highlightedVertex = this.gridRenderer.drawVertex(closestVertex, highlightColor);\n          if (this.highlightedVertex) {\n            this.edgeContainer.addChild(this.highlightedVertex);\n          }\n        }\n      }\n    }\n  }\n\n  private handleMouseDown(e: MouseEvent) {\n    const canvas = this.app.canvas;\n    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();\n    \n    if (e.button === 0) { // Left click\n      if (this.config.leftClickMode === 'spawnParticle') {\n        const edgeX = e.clientX - rect.left - this.edgeContainer.x;\n        const edgeY = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n        \n        const edgeInfo = this.gridRenderer.getEdgeAt(\n          edgeX, edgeY, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (edgeInfo) {\n          this.particleSystem.spawnParticle(edgeInfo, edgeX, edgeY);\n          return;\n        }\n      } else { // Draw mode\n        const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n        const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.gridContainer.y;\n\n        const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n          x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n        );\n\n        if (cellInfo) {\n          this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = this.config.drawState;\n          this.updateGrid();\n        }\n      }\n    } else if (e.button === 2) { // Right click: always clear cell\n      const x = e.clientX - rect.left - this.gridContainer.x;\n      const y = e.clientY - rect.top - this.edgeContainer.y;\n\n      const cellInfo = this.gridRenderer.getCellAt(\n        x, y, this.config.gridWidth, this.config.gridHeight, this.config.gridType, this.config.gridScale, this.grid\n      );\n\n      if (cellInfo) {\n        this.cellStates[cellInfo.row][cellInfo.col] = 0;\n        this.updateGrid();\n      }\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// Initialize app when DOM is ready\nif (document.readyState === 'loading') {\n  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => new GridApp());\n} else {\n  new GridApp();\n}"
  }
}
